rationale: The rule defines "camp" for a subchapter unrelated to property tax. It has no bearing on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: Sec. 2306.1121. DEFINITION. In this subchapter, "camp" has the meaning assigned by Section 48.05, Penal Code.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict exists.
